name: Heavy Pulse
effect_text: Priority Fire. Overclock. Quick Strike. Deal 9 damage.
flavor_text: Old coil, new timing, the same unchanged sound of the same settled argument.

name: Twin Torpedo
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike. Deal 5 damage twice.
flavor_text: Both tubes empty. Both tubes full. The reload was as loud as the launch.

name: Arc Beam
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Overclock. Chain Catalyst. Deal 9; adjacent 3; next card +2.
flavor_text: Jumps the room. Sets the next room up. The third room just hears the hum.

name: Phantom Lance
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Deal 8 damage.
flavor_text: Nobody files the report. The report writes itself. The pilot approves it later.

name: Radiant Cannon
effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Radiation Leak. Deal 12; 3 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: The beam leaves first. The illness follows slower. Both arrive at the same address.

name: Pulse Artillery
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Cascading Power. Overflow Fire. Deal 12; adjacent 4; +1 per non-unit card.
flavor_text: Stacks the afternoon's advantages into one round. Discharges the round, polite and terminal.

name: Smart Bomb
effect_text: Tracking Lock. Rapid Launch. Critical Strike. Deal 11 damage.
flavor_text: Already knows the target's schedule. Arrives a little ahead, like a good guest.

name: Burst Rifle
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Priority Fire. Overclock. Deal 6 damage twice, first.
flavor_text: Two rounds at the top of the queue. Two out of the chamber. Quiet.

name: Arc Rifle
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Chain Catalyst. Deal 12; adjacent take 3; next card +2 damage.
flavor_text: Current hops room to room. Rooms agree, without consultation, to match the voltage.

name: Laser Array
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Flanking Fire. Deal 6 damage twice; must be blocked by 2.
flavor_text: Fires from four angles at once. Blocks from one angle take the bill anyway.

name: Siege Drill
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Critical Strike. Overflow Fire. Deal 16; excess to ship.
flavor_text: Arms slowly. Arrives politely. Leaves nothing the siege engineer wants to itemize.

name: Reaper Cannon
effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Radiation Leak. Deal 16; 3 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: A gun the old pilots refuse to name aloud. New pilots keep asking.

name: Tactical Missile
effect_text: Manual Fire. Priority Fire. Tracking Lock. Once per turn, pay 1 for 16 damage.
flavor_text: Waits for permission. Arrives with interest. Collects on an account the target forgot about.

name: Void Reaper
effect_text: Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Radiation Leak. Deal 16; 3 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: A gun that arrives from elsewhere. Elsewhere is nowhere the fleet discusses.

name: Fusion Mortar
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 16; adjacent 5; 3 radiation.
flavor_text: One shell. Several wakes. The neighborhood files a petition later, too late.

name: Battery Burst
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Overclock. Deal 10 damage twice, first.
flavor_text: The whole battery talks at once. The enemy listens, briefly, as a courtesy.

name: Crusher Beam
effect_text: Critical Strike. Cascading Power. Deal 21 damage; +1 per non-unit card played.
flavor_text: Gathers the whole turn's advantages into one closing paragraph.

name: Shadow Torpedo
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Critical Strike. Rapid Launch. Deal 20 damage; enters unseen.
flavor_text: Never on the sensor. Never on the radar. Always on the casualty list later.

name: Apex Gun
effect_text: Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Critical Strike. Deal 12 damage twice, first.
flavor_text: Top of every mounting bracket. Top of every requisition list. Top of every enemy obituary.

name: Swift Raider
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire. Quick Strike.
flavor_text: Out of the hangar before the alarm finishes. Home before the alarm stops.

name: Shadow Scout
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Deploy Burst: Probe 2.
flavor_text: Sees everything. Says very little. Reports only what the pilot truly needs to know.

name: Heavy Guardian
effect_text: Interceptor. Auto-Repair 2. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Stands between the ship and the next bad afternoon. Usually stays standing afterwards.

name: Elite Hunter
effect_text: Tracking Lock. Critical Strike. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Names the quarry. Fires on the name. Collects a small mark for next pilot.

name: Phantom Bomber
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Critical Breach: deal 6 damage. Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: Unloads its payload without being seen. Writes its own short note when the payload lands.

name: Engineer Drone
effect_text: Auto-Repair 3. Emergency Reboot. Hull Drain.
flavor_text: Fixes the hull. Fixes itself. Carries a little of the enemy's numbers home.

name: Heavy Striker
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire. Alpha Strike.
flavor_text: Weighs twice what it should. Strikes twice as hard. Lands twice first.

name: Assault Leader
effect_text: Battle Hardened. Priority Fire. Outrider.
flavor_text: The veteran at the front of the wedge. Takes first hit. Gives the next seven.

name: Sentinel Elite
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Goes down. Comes back. Goes down again. The pilot stopped asking which run.

name: Ghost Commander
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Phase Drive. Cloaked Entry.
flavor_text: Rumor on the comm. Rumor on the sensor. A fact on the casualty roll.

name: Swarm Captain
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Battle Hardened. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Heads the swarm at the front. The swarm gets bigger. The captain stays out front.

name: Siege Bomber
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Critical Breach: deal 8 damage. Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: Warms up slowly. Arrives loud. Leaves a wide, patient crater for the engineers to study.

name: Master Tactician
effect_text: Priority Fire. Overclock. Battle Hardened.
flavor_text: Reads the fight twice. Fires once. The fight agrees with the second reading, calmly.

name: Capital Striker
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: One command from the bridge. Six hits in the first minute. Capital ship returns light.

name: Grand Defender
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Has stood at every port gate the fleet remembers. Still standing there.

name: Apex Warship
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: The kind of ship the fleet plans around. The other fleet plans around leaving.

name: Master Heat
effect_text: Persistent Field. Overclock. Efficiency Protocol.
flavor_text: Keeps the reactor singing past the gauge. Keeps the bills polite about it anyway.

name: Prime Shield
effect_text: Persistent Field. Auto-Repair 2. Ablative Plating 1.
flavor_text: Wears a little down. Knits a little up. Never the same order each shift.

name: Swift Network
effect_text: Persistent Field. Rapid Launch. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Every little ship listens. Every little ship leaves the rack on the same half-second.

name: Phantom AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry.
flavor_text: Writes the fleet out of the enemy sensor. The fleet stays written out, quietly.

name: Heat Converter
effect_text: Persistent Field. Overclock. Cascading Power.
flavor_text: Turns the reactor's complaint into the next weapon's grin.

name: Master Scanner
effect_text: Persistent Field. Probe 2 each turn. Deep Scan on deploy.
flavor_text: Reads the deck above. Reads the deck below. Writes a short summary for the pilot.

name: Drone Commander
effect_text: Persistent Field. Rapid Launch. Battle Hardened.
flavor_text: Calls the swarm. The swarm listens. The swarm comes home bigger than it went out.

name: Weapons Synchronizer
effect_text: Persistent Field. Alpha Strike. Linked Fire.
flavor_text: Every gun reads the same tempo. Every gun fires on the same bar.

name: Defense Commander
effect_text: Persistent Field. Interceptor. Ablative Plating 1.
flavor_text: Stands every wall at attention. Every wall answers. The walls outlast the argument.

name: Tactical Matrix
effect_text: Persistent Field. Tactical Draw. Cascading Power.
flavor_text: Pulls the next card early. Pays the quiet bill. Keeps the round running, compiled.

name: Master Efficiency
effect_text: Persistent Field. Efficiency Protocol. Overclock.
flavor_text: The accountant the fleet never talks about. The accountant the fleet never fires.

name: Combat Uplink
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Every gun hears the bridge. Every gun goes first. The enemy goes elsewhere.

name: Prime Adaptive
effect_text: Persistent Field. Adaptive Learning. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Learns by getting hit. Stops getting hit. Keeps learning. Keeps getting harder to hit.

name: Master Chain
effect_text: Persistent Field. Chain Catalyst. Cascading Power.
flavor_text: Stacks triggers into one loud note. The note holds. The enemy falls out of time.

name: Overmind Master
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Overclock.
flavor_text: The program the fleet admiral has bookmarked. The program the fleet admiral denies bookmarking.

name: Supreme Uplink
effect_text: Persistent Field. Adaptive Learning. Efficiency Protocol.
flavor_text: The uplink the fleet runs when the ledger is on fire. It refuses to stop.

name: Apex Network
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Linked Fire.
flavor_text: Every ship on the line reads the same page, plays the same chord, together.

name: Grand Protocol
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: The program the fleet installs on the flagship and then refuses to talk about afterwards.

name: Plasma Shield
effect_text: System Shielding. Auto-Repair 1. Ablative Plating 1.
flavor_text: Eats the first shot politely. Takes notes for the second. Stays up for the third.

name: Adaptive Armor
effect_text: Adaptive Learning. Ablative Plating 1. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Listens for the pattern. Thickens in the pattern's favorite entry point, quietly.

name: Warp Barrier
effect_text: Phase Drive. Evade 40%. Gain Stealth.
flavor_text: Half the wall is elsewhere. The elsewhere is where the enemy round ends up.

name: Heavy Bastion
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating 2.
flavor_text: Older pattern. Newer welds. The old pilots call it by the old name, politely.

name: Regen Aegis
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Emergency Reboot. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Goes down steady. Comes back steady. Steady is the only pace it knows.

name: Stealth Bastion (Elite)
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry. Evade 40%.
flavor_text: Never on the map. Never on the manifest. Never the first thing targeted.

name: Reactive Aegis
effect_text: System Shielding. Critical Breach: deal 6 damage. Ablative Plating 2.
flavor_text: Three small habits, one polite frame, the same quiet refusal to leave the deck.

name: Counter Bastion
effect_text: Countermeasure 2. Signal Jammer. Negate.
flavor_text: Writes the enemy a polite refusal letter. Signs it on their behalf. Mails it back.

name: Master Fortress
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: The wall whose name is whispered on the bridge before the pilot agrees to launch.

name: Phase Bastion
effect_text: Phase Drive. Gain Stealth. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Half the wall exists here. Half exists elsewhere. Both halves refuse to fall.

name: Regen Fortress
effect_text: Auto-Repair 3. Emergency Reboot. Ablative Plating 2.
flavor_text: Never the loudest hull on the dock. Never the first one to need the dock.

name: Titanic Aegis
effect_text: Ablative Plating 4. Emergency Reboot. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Four layers of slow refusal. The fifth layer is the pilot's stubbornness, added without permission.

name: Ultimate Shield
effect_text: Ablative Plating 3. Auto-Repair 3. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: The shield that made the old recruiting-poster captain look so calm about everything.

name: Fortress Bastion
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: Takes the gate. Holds the gate. When it gives, stands up again, new gate raised.

name: Apex Aegis
effect_text: Ablative Plating 4. Auto-Repair 2. Emergency Reboot.
flavor_text: The shield the fleet drags out only when the mission brief uses the word 'final'.

name: Primordial Wall
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Auto-Repair 3.
flavor_text: Older than the fleet. Older than the enemy fleet. Still doing the same patient work.

name: Quantum Warhead
effect_text: Phase Drive. Radiation Leak. Deal 12 damage; 3 radiation over 3 turns.
flavor_text: Arrives through a crack. The crack closes. The crack leaves a forwarding note.

name: Nano Swarm
effect_text: Auto-Repair 3 on your ship this turn. Emergency Reboot if destroyed.
flavor_text: A thousand small hands closing small wounds with small, steady stitches.

name: Disruption Spike
effect_text: Signal Jamming. Disable. Apply Lock. Enemy cannot play Maneuvers; target skips refresh.
flavor_text: A bright needle in the enemy's clock. The clock stays bright. The hands stay still.

name: Ion Cluster
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Deal 14 damage to target subsystem; adjacent take 4.
flavor_text: Several smaller weapons in one shell. Each one polite. Together, not at all.

name: Tactical Override
effect_text: Hack/Corrupt. Transform/Overhaul. Gain control of target enemy Drone, rebuild it friendly.
flavor_text: Changes the drone's mind. Changes the drone's colors. Changes the roster, quietly.

name: Master Repair
effect_text: Restore 15 HP to your ship. Auto-Repair 3 for 2 turns.
flavor_text: Big kit. Patient crew. A long afternoon that ends with the hull better than new.

name: Plasma Annihilator
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Deal 20 damage; adjacent 5; excess to ship.
flavor_text: The briefcase opens slowly. The afternoon closes quickly, rearranged around the briefcase.

name: Phase Warhead
effect_text: Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Deal 18 damage; bypasses most blockers.
flavor_text: Arrives on the wrong sensor band. Leaves on the right casualty list.

name: Stasis Field
effect_text: Tractor Beam Hold. Disable. Freeze up to 2 enemy units for 2 turns.
flavor_text: A small quiet room. The room holds on to what it was given. Refuses explanations.

name: Nuke Kit
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Radiation Leak. Overflow Fire. Deal 24; adjacent 6; 4 radiation; excess to ship.
flavor_text: The kit the engineers sign out by name. They return it late, every time, quietly.

name: Quantum Reset
effect_text: System Reset. Probe 3. Clear all friendly statuses; draw 3 cards.
flavor_text: The fleet powers down for a breath. Powers up with every bad debt resolved.

name: Grand Warhead
effect_text: Priority Fire. Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Deal 28; adjacent 8; excess to ship.
flavor_text: Every storage bay has one. No storage bay crew likes to say so out loud.

name: Priority Barrage
effect_text: All your Weapons gain Priority Fire and Alpha Strike this turn.
flavor_text: One order. Every gun agrees. Every target finds this out slightly too late.

name: Tactical Draw
effect_text: Tactical Draw. Probe 2. Draw 3 cards; lose 1 energy next turn.
flavor_text: Grabs three pages from tomorrow. Pays a small bill at the door coming in.

name: Master Evasion
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn; restore 3 HP.
flavor_text: Stick moves. Everything outside the cockpit goes blurry. Nothing lands. Nothing ends.

name: Warp Jump
effect_text: All your units gain Phase Drive this turn.
flavor_text: The fleet steps out of the page briefly. Steps back with a better answer.

name: Emergency Swarm
effect_text: All your Drones gain Rapid Launch and Priority Fire this turn.
flavor_text: Every hangar door opens at the same second. Every pilot lies about being ready.

name: Grand Strike
effect_text: All your units gain Priority Fire and Alpha Strike this turn.
flavor_text: One word on the comm. The whole fleet finishes the sentence together, loudly.

name: Perfect Defense
effect_text: Prevent all damage to your ship this turn; gain 10 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: A small move. A large refusal. The enemy never writes it up, professionally embarrassed.

name: Apex Charge
effect_text: All your Weapons gain Critical Strike and Overclock this turn.
flavor_text: The fleet commits. The reactor commits. The enemy commits to leaving, late.

name: Tactical Reset
effect_text: System Reset on all friendly units. Probe 3. Draw 2 cards.
flavor_text: A deep breath across the whole fleet. Everyone comes back with their best morning ready.

name: Grand Vector
effect_text: All your units gain Priority Fire, Rapid Launch, and Reactive this turn.
flavor_text: One word over the comm. The fleet arrives everywhere it intended. Leaves nothing.

name: Master Targeting
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Priority Fire, Tracking Lock, Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Three lenses. Three opinions. The fourth is the pilot's. The target agrees with all four.

name: Phantom Cloak
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains Gain Stealth, Cloaked Entry, Evade 40%.
flavor_text: A garment the drone never discusses with its owner. It wears the cloak anyway.

name: Elite Plating (Rare)
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +6 defense, Reinforced Hull, Ablative Plating 2.
flavor_text: Thicker than the rookie's frame. Stubborner than the rookie's pilot. Both get older together.

name: Fleet Conduit
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your ship gains Crew Pooling and Cascading Power.
flavor_text: A single wire down the spine of the fleet. Every ship reads the same heartbeat.

name: Grand Scope
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Priority Fire, Critical Strike, Alpha Strike.
flavor_text: A lens the sniper brings out when the record book needs a new first name.

name: Battle Zone
effect_text: Environmental. All units gain Priority Fire. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: Every ship in the region reads the same short rule: fire early. Every ship obeys.

name: Defensive Zone
effect_text: Environmental. All Defense units gain Interceptor and Ablative Plating 1.
flavor_text: A polite edict across the battlefield. The walls salute. Every wall decides to hold.

name: Chaos Zone
effect_text: Environmental. At start of each turn, deal 3 damage to every unit. Breach Cascade effects trigger twice.
flavor_text: The region has no taste for pilots who hesitate. Every hesitation pays a small bill.

name: Deferred Zone
effect_text: Environmental. Deferred Deployment. Modules may be stored face-down as energy; played later for -1 cost.
flavor_text: A region where time waits for the pilot. The pilot spends that waiting wisely.
